name: Tap Score Lead and Copper Water Test
bestFor: Readers whose main question is whether lead or copper are showing up at the tap and who do not need a huge city-water panel yet.
whyItFits: This is the cleanest recommendation when the decision is narrow and the site is trying not to oversell a much broader test than the reader actually needs.
watchout: It will not answer the broader disinfection-byproduct or volatile-organic-compound questions that can matter after water-main work or a wider city-water concern.
evidenceNote: Tap Score says this kit is recommended for targeted lead and copper testing, includes certified laboratory analysis, and reports quantified lead and copper results.
